'''Bendodi Ballow-Reese''' was the eldest member of the crew stationed on the research outpost [[ExGal-4]] on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. He had been a soldier for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Bendodi was one of four scientists that went on an expedition to scout out a large storm on the planet. As they approached it, the atmosphere, affected by the infiltrator [[Yomin Carr]]'s [[dweebit]]s, became increasingly toxic. The expedition had trouble returning to the base after discovering the storm, due to low [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] rations. Realizing that not all of the team would be able to return to the base, Bendodi gave his oxygen pack to [[Jerem Cadmir]] before escaping into the jungle to die. [[Luther De'Ono]], a friend of Bendodi, followed to beg him to not commit [[Death/Legends|suicide]], only to be shot by Bendodi. Moments later, Bendodi shot himself.<ref name="VP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}}
